The gray memories reveal past information (盗天魔尊 named 本杰孙, 红莲/鬼脸/幽魂魔尊 involvement in rebirth, 太日阳莽, 紫山真君, 大荔 as 八转大力真武仙僵) but these are presented as memories being witnessed by characters in the moment, not as privately held hidden knowledge with clear whoKnows/whoDoesNotKnow boundaries. No fact candidate meets the strict criteria for a single atomic hidden/future-known fact with direct source support for who knows vs. who doesn't.
